default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss website SEO strategy, localization efforts, and analyze blog performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/ddQGFT5VQZxoQFhHQgy-rfoV6YPu6oQp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Localization efforts underway for Spanish and French; need SEO strategy for new locales](https://fathom.video/share/ddQGFT5VQZxoQFhHQgy-rfoV6YPu6oQp?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Recent publishing issues caused delays; need to improve communication and escalation processes](https://fathom.video/share/ddQGFT5VQZxoQFhHQgy-rfoV6YPu6oQp?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Blog performance metrics show a decline in clicks; deeper analysis needed to understand trends and improve lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/ddQGFT5VQZxoQFhHQgy-rfoV6YPu6oQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)

## Topics

### Localization and SEO Strategy

  - [Spanish and French versions of the homepage launched](https://fathom.video/share/ddQGFT5VQZxoQFhHQgy-rfoV6YPu6oQp?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Need to develop SEO strategy for new locales, including keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/ddQGFT5VQZxoQFhHQgy-rfoV6YPu6oQp?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Technical SEO audit required for international optimization](https://fathom.video/share/ddQGFT5VQZxoQFhHQgy-rfoV6YPu6oQp?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Focus remains on US market and English content for now](https://fathom.video/share/ddQGFT5VQZxoQFhHQgy-rfoV6YPu6oQp?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)

### Publishing Issues and Process Improvements

  - [Recent publishing delays due to technical issues with Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/ddQGFT5VQZxoQFhHQgy-rfoV6YPu6oQp?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Improved escalation process needed: create support ticket within 24 hours of issue](https://fathom.video/share/ddQGFT5VQZxoQFhHQgy-rfoV6YPu6oQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
  - [Webflow has a 4-hour SLA for support tickets](https://fathom.video/share/ddQGFT5VQZxoQFhHQgy-rfoV6YPu6oQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
  - [Need to review and adjust user access permissions in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/ddQGFT5VQZxoQFhHQgy-rfoV6YPu6oQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)

### Blog Performance Analysis

  - [Overall clicks have dropped in recent weeks](https://fathom.video/share/ddQGFT5VQZxoQFhHQgy-rfoV6YPu6oQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [Deeper analysis required to understand performance of lead-generating articles](https://fathom.video/share/ddQGFT5VQZxoQFhHQgy-rfoV6YPu6oQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
  - [Need to correlate clicks, impressions, and lead generation for specific articles](https://fathom.video/share/ddQGFT5VQZxoQFhHQgy-rfoV6YPu6oQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
  - [Goal: Make SEO a reliable engine for generating SQLs/MQLs monthly](https://fathom.video/share/ddQGFT5VQZxoQFhHQgy-rfoV6YPu6oQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)

### Communication and Accountability

  - [Move all communication to Firework Slack channel for better visibility](https://fathom.video/share/ddQGFT5VQZxoQFhHQgy-rfoV6YPu6oQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [Set clear timelines for resolving issues and implementing process improvements](https://fathom.video/share/ddQGFT5VQZxoQFhHQgy-rfoV6YPu6oQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Improve communication with Webflow team regarding support and vacations](https://fathom.video/share/ddQGFT5VQZxoQFhHQgy-rfoV6YPu6oQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to conduct technical SEO audit for international optimization](https://fathom.video/share/ddQGFT5VQZxoQFhHQgy-rfoV6YPu6oQp?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Cameron/Ritesh to discuss user access and permissions with Webflow CSM](https://fathom.video/share/ddQGFT5VQZxoQFhHQgy-rfoV6YPu6oQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [Implement improved escalation process for publishing issues](https://fathom.video/share/ddQGFT5VQZxoQFhHQgy-rfoV6YPu6oQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
  - [Prateek to provide deeper analysis of blog performance, focusing on lead-generating articles](https://fathom.video/share/ddQGFT5VQZxoQFhHQgy-rfoV6YPu6oQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
  - [Set up process improvements within 3-5 days and report back to Abhishek](https://fathom.video/share/ddQGFT5VQZxoQFhHQgy-rfoV6YPu6oQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Continue focus on US market while developing strategy for new locales](https://fathom.video/share/ddQGFT5VQZxoQFhHQgy-rfoV6YPu6oQp?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)

action_items.description: Email Webflow team re recent issues; request improved communication + backup contact info when reps unavailable
Work w/ Cameron to map all Webflow users, define access levels/permissions; create process to restrict unnecessary access
Prepare data on blog performance excl. Easter articles; present at next meeting
Analyze 11 SQL-generating articles; correlate impressions, clicks, leads by week; identify patterns for high-performing content
